title: 智能无线卷发棒Pro 快速搞定氛围感卷发
style_vibe: clean-tech极简科技风，明亮清爽，突出高效便捷的造型体验

shots.scene_description_query: young professional woman checking watch worriedly in bright minimalist bedroom
shots.visual_description: 明亮极简的卧室内，28岁左右职场女性着急出门，低头看手表面露焦虑
shots.voiceover_text: 赶时间出门还在为卷发发愁？
shots.subtitle_text: 赶时间出门还在为卷发发愁？

shots.scene_description_query: close up of white smart wireless curling iron with temperature control display
shots.visual_description: 特写乳白色智能无线卷发棒Pro，机身亮起3档控温显示屏，质感高级简洁
shots.voiceover_text: 这款智能无线卷发棒帮你搞定

shots.scene_description_query: woman using wireless curling iron to curl hair easily, anti-scald design visible
shots.visual_description: 女生轻松拿起卷发棒操作，几秒就卷好一绺蓬松卷发，防烫外壳碰到手也没有不适反应
shots.voiceover_text: 无线设计随行随用，防烫更安全
shots.subtitle_text: 无线便携 防烫设计更安全

shots.scene_description_query: close up of curling iron type-c charging port with 10min fast charging icon
shots.visual_description: 特写卷发棒Type-C充电口，屏幕弹出10分钟快充的提示标识

shots.scene_description_query: woman with bouncy curly hair putting curling iron into small handbag smiling
shots.visual_description: 女生顶着蓬松自然的卷发，笑着把卷发棒放进随身小包里，拎包准备出门
